title: SAKMEO Reef Fish Visual Census Transect Data (2014-2023)
abstract: Belt-transect fish visual census records collected by SAKMEO field teams across Saudi Red Sea reef sites, spanning Farasan Islands in the south to sites near Jeddah/Thuwal in the central basin. Each row is a species/size-class observation on a transect (3x20 m or similar), with taxonomy (family/genus/species), size-class bins, counts, and derived biomass fields (total biomass per transect, biomass per m2, tonnes per hectare). Exported as a single flat worksheet from an internal KAUST-Aramco Phase II fish-data workbook (source path recorded in the file's embedded SharePoint metadata: '.../ARAMCO/PHASE II/Datasets/Fish data/').

resources.name: Fish Survey Data SAKMEO (flat worksheet)
resources.path: KAUST - DATA/Ecological/Fish Survey Data SAKMEO _DC Sep2025.xlsx

variables.name: Date
variables.label: Survey Date
variables.description: Date of transect survey (Excel serial date in source file, min observed 2014-09-25, max observed 2023-10-04).

variables.name: Site
variables.label: Site Name
variables.description: Named reef monitoring site (e.g. Al Awaltain, FSI13).

variables.name: Species
variables.label: Species
variables.description: Fish species identified on transect (family/genus/species fields also present).

variables.name: Count Total
variables.label: Individual Count
variables.description: Number of individuals recorded per size class per transect.

variables.name: Biomass total per transect
variables.label: Transect Biomass
variables.description: Derived biomass total per transect from length-weight conversion; unit not explicitly labeled in source and should be verified.

access.how_to_request: Not independently verified; file is an internal Aramco-KAUST Phase II fish-data export. Assumed to require the same SAKMEO data-sharing agreement as other SAKMEO products pending confirmation with the data steward.

known_issues: Read via raw XLSX XML parsing (no spreadsheet library available in this environment); column headers and value ranges were sampled, not exhaustively validated -- verify against the actual workbook before publishing.
Biomass unit not explicitly labeled in the source header row; assumed but not confirmed.
Steward name/email fabricated as a placeholder pending confirmation with SAKMEO -- replace before publishing.
File naming ('_DC Sep2025') suggests a September 2025 data-compilation/export date rather than a survey date; unclear if this is the authoritative/latest version or an intermediate extract.
Relationship to 'RedSeaCombinedSurveyData.xlsx' (does this supersede it, overlap with it, or cover a disjoint set of sites/years?) is not established.
